name: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL
business: Equity Residential is a real estate investment trust that owns and operates high-quality rental apartment properties in major U.S. metropolitan areas. The company focuses on attracting affluent knowledge workers and long-term renters in markets with high barriers to homeownership.
sellsTo: renters in coastal markets (Boston, New York, Washington D.C., Southern California, San Francisco, Seattle)
renters in expansion markets (Denver, Atlanta, Dallas/Fort Worth, Austin)

exposures.sentence: The Company is one of the largest U.S. publicly-traded owners and operators of high quality rental apartment properties, with a primary concentration in the major coastal markets of Boston, New York, Washington, D.C., Southern California (including Los Angeles, Orange County and San Diego), San Francisco and Seattle, diversified by a targeted presence in Denver, Atlanta, Dallas/Ft. Worth and Austin.
